title: secale ancestrale var. dighoricum
intro: Secale ancestrale var. dighoricum, also known as Wild Rye or Dighoricum Wild Rye, is a rare variety of rye grass that has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. It is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Secale ancestrale var. dighoricum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve symptoms of IBS and other gastrointestinal issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Secale ancestrale var. dighoricum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
